Retrieve metric metadata such as type and unit.

query.description: Series selector argument used to scope metric discovery.
One or more search terms matched against metric names (OR logic).
Fuzzy threshold in the range 0-100. A value of 0 is the lowest fuzzy threshold.
Fuzzy algorithm. Supported values are subsequence (default) and jarowinkler.
Whether matching is case-sensitive.
Sort mode. Supported values are alpha and score.
Sort direction. Only valid with sort_by=alpha. Supported values are asc and dsc.
Include the relevance score in each result.
Include metric metadata in each result.

End timestamp for metric name search.
Maximum number of metric names to return.
Preferred number of results per NDJSON batch.

description.content: Retrieve server status and configuration.

response.name: Configuration retrieved successfully.
response.body:
{
  "data": {
    "yaml": "global:
  scrape_interval: 15s
  scrape_timeout: 10s
  evaluation_interval: 15s
  external_labels:
    environment: demo-prometheus-io
alerting:
  alertmanagers:
  - scheme: http
    static_configs:
    - targets:
      - demo.prometheus.io:9093
rule_files:
- /etc/prometheus/rules/*.yml
"
  },
  "status": "success"
}

response.name: Command-line flags retrieved successfully.
response.body:
{
  "data": {
    "agent": "false",
    "alertmanager.notification-queue-capacity": "10000",
    "config.file": "/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml",
    "enable-feature": "exemplar-storage,native-histograms",
    "query.max-concurrency": "20",
    "query.timeout": "2m",
    "storage.tsdb.path": "/prometheus",
    "storage.tsdb.retention.time": "15d",
    "web.console.libraries": "/usr/share/prometheus/console_libraries",
    "web.console.templates": "/usr/share/prometheus/consoles",
    "web.enable-admin-api": "true",
    "web.enable-lifecycle": "true",
    "web.listen-address": "0.0.0.0:9090",
    "web.page-title": "Prometheus Time Series Collection and Processing Server"
  },
  "status": "success"
}

query.description: The maximum number of items to return per category.

description.content: Returns Prometheus' own instrumentation metrics from its internal client registry, as structured JSON. Supports optional regex filtering via the metric_name_pattern parameter.

query.description: Regular expression filter for metric names (fully anchored, like PromQL label matchers). Only metric families whose names fully match the pattern are returned.

description.content: Query enabled features.
Remote read and write endpoints.
Prometheus remote read endpoint for federated queries. Accepts and returns Protocol Buffer encoded data.
Prometheus remote write endpoint for sending metrics. Accepts Protocol Buffer encoded write requests.
OpenTelemetry Protocol metrics ingestion.
OpenTelemetry Protocol metrics ingestion endpoint. Accepts OTLP/HTTP metrics in Protocol Buffer format.
Server notifications and events.

Prometheus is an Open-Source monitoring system with a dimensional data model, flexible query language, efficient time series database and modern alerting approach.

Contact Support:
 Name: Prometheus Community
